regions.text: What were some other great discoveries? One of them was fire. Smoke Fire is of very great use to men. It gives us heat.
Another great discovery was the wheel. Wheels are round. They go round. A cart They are of very great use to man.
Another great discovery was clothing. What are these? These are some other sorts of clothing. A skirt A shirt
The making of cloth was a great discovery. This is how we make cloth. These are threads. (See page 167.) They go across from one side to the other of a frame.
